objective: Build and run a sandbox dry-run harness that proves the real MARKET sample intake plumbing from V3.83 operator handoff through V3.80 raw registry, V3.82 controlled routing, and controlled V3.78 validation without writing real data_raw paths, official target source, labels, portfolio outputs, or model promotion evidence.
forbidden: Do not copy, move, or edit real raw provider samples.
Do not run V3.53, label generation, portfolio validation, NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or model promotion outputs.
Do not treat synthetic dry-run data as market evidence.
acceptance_criteria: V3.80 dry-run registry blocks review before sandbox license status is written.
V3.80 dry-run registry allows review after sandbox license status is written.
V3.82 creates at least one controlled V3.78 config from the sandbox registry.
Controlled V3.78 validation executes in the sandbox and passes candidate-file intake.
Real incoming directory and official target source state are unchanged.
Global agent framework check remains passing after V3.85.
failure_conditions: Any real data_raw path is created or written by this task.
Synthetic dry-run data is written to the official target source.
A controlled V3.78 config is generated without V3.80 license approval.
Any V3.53, label, portfolio, or model-promotion output is generated.
quality_gates: Controlled V3.78 manifest self_check_pass is true.
agent_run_manifest.json satisfies the manifest required field schema.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: Use the same chain with a real licensed provider sample: V3.83 operator pack, V3.80 registry, V3.82 route plan, controlled V3.78 validation, then V3.75/V3.76 before any V3.53 importer.
